name: editorialist
description: A structured editorial review system for manuscripts in Obsidian.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run css-check && npm run css-audit && npm run qa-audit && node esbuild.config.mjs production && npm run copy:dev && node scripts/backup-if-stale.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run css-check && npm run css-audit && npm run qa-audit
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run test && npm run css-drift -- --maintenance && npm run build
scripts.backup: npm run test && npm run css-drift -- --maintenance && npm run build && node scripts/backup.mjs
